titleStmt.title: SII 4.1248: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1248. (A.R. No. 355 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakavarṣa 1034 svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpridhvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēsva
ra paramabhaṭṭāraka ravikulatilaka cōḷakulasēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśra
ya rājarājēṁdra vīramahēṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa rājakēsarivarmmape
rmmānaḍigalu gaṁggākāvērīparyyaṁtasaptamaviṣṇuvarddhanulaina tribhuvanacakra
vartti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara pravarddhamāna vijayarājyadivyasaṁvatsa 43 śrahi
gaṁggagoṇḍacōḍavalanāṁṭi guddavādinaṁṭi peddaḍākarēmi śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara yuttara
dikuyayina mahēśvaradēvara dēvadānamaina velpūriṁ raṭṭaḍikamu gaṁṇḍaṁ yaśēṣasa rvvasa
ṁpadalatōṁ gūḍaṁ jakravartti śrīparāṁtakadēvaraku muppadimāḍalu peṭṭi siṁggalabhaḍā
ruṇḍu villiccikoni śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara guḍi Uttaradikkunaṁ bitrusthānamunaṁ mahē
svaradēvarasannidhānamunaṁ baccimaśrōtayaina saptagōdāvarīkartta siṁggalabhaḍā
rala peṭṭina maṭamunaṁ guḍvaṁgala nānādēśiyāgatulaina tapasulu brāhmalu
nuṁgā muppaṇḍrakuṁ bērokkanikaṁ badiEnmidiyaina ḍaṁggubrāla ku 1 ma 1 gā brāhmaṇa
ṁḍraku dina 1ṇṭi ki viḍvaṁ ḍaṁggubrāla ku 32 ma 9 pappuku 3 neyi ma 3 callaku va
40 ṇṭiki ma 3 pa 3
jītamunaku mākuṭigoṇḍanaku va kha 16 peddiyuniḍludravaṁ bōyu
vāniki jīvi ci 5 vaḍla kha 2 kaṟṟalu veṭṭuvāniki kolapu 1 nuṁ guḍigolvunaku vaḍla kha
15 kaḍuvalu veṭṭu kummari Okkaniki jītamu vaḍla kha 9 bōyuniki jītamunaku nela
kha 3 nu nācaṁdrārkkamu bōyuṇḍu dēva nāyakuniki tōṁṭapaṟaṟunēla
na 10 nu Īśālaku varuvaḍlu 3 ṟunu pāṇḍimodavulu 10 nu Īṁdulakī brā
hmalakuṁ guḍvaṁgala yalupaṭipani palalu 150 nu vaḍḍiṁcu caṭṭuvamu 1
ṇṭinaina pala 4 naṁgā nimmārggamunu naḍapaṁgalavārugā varāha dēvaraina sigga
laThe inscription is unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 4.1248 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
